{{Infobox location
| name = Inn of the Drifting Light
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Inn of the Drifting Light]] is an establishment for members of the [[Jai clan]] made of gray stone blocks.}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Inn of the Drifting Light]] is a stone cube bigger than the [[Shi family]] complex.}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
